app.name: Social Income
app.one_liner: An open-source platform that delivers unconditional basic income directly to people in poverty via mobile phones using transparent and verifiable selection processes.

screens.name: Country Landing Page
screens.purpose: Provide localized information about Social Income operations per country.

screens.name: Recipient Dashboard
screens.purpose: Display recipient status, payment history, and program information.

screens.name: Transparency Portal
screens.purpose: Show verifiable proof of fair recipient selection using drand and dchoose.

rust_commands.name: hash_and_commit_list
rust_commands.purpose: Salt, hash, and commit raw recipient lists to the repository for transparency.

rust_commands.name: run_recipient_draw
rust_commands.purpose: Execute the verifiable recipient selection process using drand randomness and dchoose logic.

rust_commands.name: sync_storyblok_content
rust_commands.purpose: Pull updated content from Storyblok CMS into the website frontend.

mvp_plan: week 1: Implement dchoose-based draw logic in recipients_selection module
week 1: Integrate drand client for fetching public randomness
week 1: Set up Firebase emulator with seed data from /seed directory
week 2: Build Transparency Portal screen to display /lists and /draws
week 2: Connect recipient mobile app to Firestore for real-time updates
week 2: Migrate hardcoded navigation to Storyblok CMS
week 3: Add Google Tag Manager integration for analytics
week 3: Deprecate /ui Storybook components in favor of /website implementations
week 3: Write end-to-end test for full draw-and-notify workflow
acceptance_tests: Given a country landing page PR, when merged, then the page is live on the Next.js website with correct localization.
Given a drand randomness beacon, when draw.sh runs, then results are reproducible using dchoose and written to /draws.
Given a new participant list, when hashed and committed, then it appears in /lists with a verifiable salt.
Given a Storyblok CMS update, when sync command runs, then website content reflects the latest version.
